title: Make A Modpack
description: This modpack has base mods for you to create your own modpack.
body:
This modpack has base mods for you to create your own modpack. This includes optimization, libs, APIs, bug fixes and small tweaks. This is so you can easily create a modpack because all the libs and essentials is alredy installed. Essential is a mod that is part of the modpack, and not all modpacks fit essential. Delete the mods that doesn't fit your modpack.

##                                  **How to install and use**

1. Open the modrinth app and search: Make a modpack
2. Click on the icon and go to versions.
3. Choose your verson and click install or download.
4. Go to your new instance and click: install or download content
5. Chosse your mods and click play!

##    **Mods**

## **Creators:**
HorizonPiece05

## **Why Install This**

Chosse this modpack because it has most Libs and Configs so you probably don't need to intall any more. it does not have any big game changing mods so any mod will fit right in.
